name: rom-launcher
title: ROM Launcher
description: Launch your retro game collection with cover art, achievements, and play stats - supports RetroArch, MAME, DuckStation, and more.
author: glct26

commands.name: index
commands.title: Browse ROMs
commands.description: View your game library, check achievements, and launch games

commands.name: manage-libraries
commands.title: Manage Libraries
commands.description: Add and configure ROM folders and emulator cores

preferences.name: retroarchPath
preferences.title: RetroArch Executable
preferences.description: Select the RetroArch application or executable file.

preferences.name: coresPath
preferences.title: RetroArch Cores Directory
preferences.description: Select the folder containing libretro cores (Leave empty if using default Windows folder structure)

preferences.name: mamePath
preferences.title: MAME Executable
preferences.description: Select the standalone MAME executable file.

preferences.name: duckstationPath
preferences.title: DuckStation Executable
preferences.description: Select the standalone DuckStation application or executable file.

preferences.name: dolphinPath
preferences.title: Dolphin Executable
preferences.description: Select the standalone Dolphin application or executable file.

preferences.name: pcsx2Path
preferences.title: PCSX2 Executable
preferences.description: Select the standalone PCSX2 executable file.

preferences.name: ppssppPath
preferences.title: PPSSPP Executable
preferences.description: Select the standalone PPSSPP executable file.

preferences.name: showDetails
preferences.title: View Options
preferences.label: Show Game Details
preferences.description: Show cover arts and game details in a side panel. Disabling saves bandwidth.

preferences.name: updateInterval
preferences.title: Database Update Frequency
preferences.description: How often to update the background ROM database (approx. 5-10 MB per sync).

preferences.name: customDatabaseUrl
preferences.title: Custom Database URL
preferences.description: Optional: Override the default database URL with your own JSON link.
